title: Doctor Phase 1 fixture implementation start
body: Cirrus Swooping Cloud opening Doctor Phase 1 fixture implementation on agentic-engineering-enhancements. Scope is pure agent-tools practice-substrate evaluators plus literal fixture tests only: no root practice:substrate aliases, no repo-file reads in tests, no live git/fs/env/cwd access in tests, and no Phase 2 report-mode CLI wiring.
